entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe coordination in plants (tropic, responses) and animals (nervous coordination in human, structure of neurones, sense organs and endocrine system)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorm: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of coordination in plants and animals
Jigsaw: Guide students to discuss types of tropic responses in plants through jigsaw
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss nervous coordination in human, structure of neurons, sense organs and endocrine system in human
entries.assessment: Coordination in plants and animals described clearly
resources: Models/pictures of sense organs, young plants, charts showing plants tropic responses, models/charts/ pictures showing structure of neurones and online resouces on plants and animals coordination
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe the mechanism of excretion in the human body (systems: organs, products)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of excretion in human
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss excretory organs, products and urinary system
ICT based learning: Guide students to explain common complications and disorders of human excretory system through simulation/ video
entries.assessment: The mechanism of excretion in human body is described clearly
resources: Models/ charts/ pictures of human urinary system, picture of mammalian kidney, online resources on human excretion and charts illustrating disoders of human excretory system
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (c) Describe the mechanism of regulation in the human body (temperature regulation, blood sugar regulation and osmoregulation)
teaching_learning_activities: Question and answers: Guide students to explain the concept of regulation in human body through questions and answers
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss mechanism of temperature regulation, blood sugar regulation and osmoregulation
ICT based learning: Guide students to demonstrate mechanisms of temperature regulation by using digital simulation or videos
entries.assessment: The mechanism of regulation in the human body is described clearly
resources: Charts on temperature and blood sugar regulation and online resouces of temperature regulation, blood sugar regulation and osmoregulation
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct biological investigations
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic skills for conducting biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (a) Investigate the process of nervous coordination (reflex arc and knee jerk)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss the processes involved during reflex arc and knee jerk
ICT based learning: Guide students to demonstrate the process of nervous coordination by using a digital simulations or videos
Experimentation: Guide students to demonstrate a simple experiment on the human nervous coordination that involves knee jerk
entries.assessment: The process of nervous coordination is investigated correctly
resources: Sharp objects, hot objects, animal toys models (snake, scorpion), live small animals specimens and nervous coordination online resources
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct biological investigations
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic skills for conducting biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (b) Investigate tropic responses in plants
teaching_learning_activities: Project : Organize students in groups to perform experiment to investigate tropic responses in plants
entries.assessment: Tropic responses in plants are investigated correctly
resources: Variety of plants Seedlings, pots, seeds, soil, water, boxes and online resources/ charts on tropic responses in plants
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct biological investigations
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Carry out a biological project work using biological principles
entries.learning_activity: (a) Develop and carry out a simple research project in Biology
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students to discuss the principles of carrying out a biological research project
Experiment: Guide students to carry out a biological research project using the required principles
entries.assessment: A biological research project work is developed and carried out correctly
resources: Text/online resources on principles of biological projects
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students to discuss the principles of carrying out a biological research project
Experiment: Guide students to carry out a biological research project using the required principles
entries.assessment: A biological research project work is developed and carried out correctly
resources: Text/online resources on principles of biological projects
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct biological investigations
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Carry out a biological project work using biological principles
entries.learning_activity: (a) Develop and carry out a simple research project in Biology
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students to discuss the principles of carrying out a biological research project
Experiment: Guide students to carry out a biological research project using the required principles

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe reproduction in plants (concept of reproduction in plants, asexual and sexual reproduction, pollination and fertilization)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of reproduction in plants
Group discussion:Guide students in manageable groups to discuss on the asexual and sexual reproduction, pollination and fertilization in plants
entries.assessment: Reproduction in plants is described clearly
resources: Reproduction in plants online resources, potted plants, hibiscus flowers, bean flowers, elephant grass flowers, hand lens, surgical/ razor blade, pictures/ illustration showing reproduction in plants
entries.references: TIE, Biology for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education
